title: ToyProto Application Command Schemas
description: Reference schemas for ToyProto key-value application commands.
rules: REQUEST messages contain exactly the argument count required by the selected command.
Successful RESPONSE messages contain exactly one string value.
KV_GET for a missing key returns ERROR(NOT_FOUND).
KV_DELETE is idempotent and may return either 'deleted' or 'not found'.
The default key-value store limit is 1024 distinct keys.
